- **Purpose**: What problem does this solve for NFPs?
- **Target Audience**: Who benefits from this solution?

## Testing

- [ ] Tested in fresh Power Platform environment
- [ ] All flows trigger correctly
- [ ] Canvas apps load without errors
- [ ] Forms save and validate data properly

## Pre-Submission Checklist
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING.md guidelines
- [ ] I have followed the repository structure guidelines
- [ ] My solution includes comprehensive documentation
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, API keys, or secrets
- [ ] RBAC is configured appropriately
- [ ] Solution follows Power Platform best practices
- [ ] I have tested in a fresh environment
- [ ] I have updated or added documentation
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
